query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — retro film fade, nostalgic melancholy palette

response.objective_caption: A person stands with hands on hips in front of heavy floor-length curtains, photographed from a low angle. They wear an elaborate outfit composed of a tall white feathered headpiece, voluminous curly hair, multiple strands of long pearls, a tiered corset top with ruffled edges, and a dark puffy jacket worn off one shoulder. The subject looks upward, and directional lighting creates bright highlights and deep shadows across the fabrics and backdrop.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person stands with hands on hips in front of heavy warm golden curtains, photographed from a low angle. They wear an elaborate outfit composed of a tall white feathered headpiece, voluminous curly hair, multiple strands of long pearls, a tiered corset top with ruffled edges, and a dark puffy jacket worn off one shoulder. The subject looks upward under a sickly blue-purple tint that washes over their skin and clothing, conflicting with the amber background lighting and creating uneven mixed color temperatures across the frame.
